personal.name: Sulaiman Hashimi
personal.badge: Breaking things so you don't have to
personal.bio: I break things on purpose — so your users never have to. 4+ years building the automation systems that let teams ship fast and sleep soundly.

services.title: Framework Architecture
services.desc: Most teams inherit a test framework they hate. I build ones they actually want to use — scalable, CI/CD-ready, and built for the whole team from day one.

services.title: CI/CD Integration
services.desc: No more 'it worked on my machine.' I wire your test suite into CI/CD so every commit gets verified before it ever reaches production.

services.title: Quality Strategy
services.desc: Most bugs are born in the design meeting, not the code review. I sit at that table early — so quality is built in, not bolted on.

pills: Python, TypeScript, Robot Framework, Selenium, Playwright, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Jira, Confluence, SQL, Postman, Tosca, Agile/Scrum, ITIL, VS Code, Android Testing, Visual Regression, Page Object Model, API Testing, E2E Testing
hlPills: Python, TypeScript, Robot Framework, Selenium, Playwright

experience.title: Test Automation Engineer
experience.desc: Full ownership of testing across the team — strategy, manual, and automated. I introduced TypeScript and Playwright as the automation stack and built a testing practice from the ground up within the organisation. From defining what to test and how, to executing it hands-on every sprint.
experience.tags: TypeScript, Playwright, Test Strategy, Manual Testing, Automated Testing, Agile, Jira

experience.title: Test Automation Engineer
experience.desc: Government forms. 1 million users. Zero room for error. I built the automation framework from scratch — Python, Robot Framework, Selenium — and wired it straight into GitHub Actions CI/CD. I was in the room when the design was still on a whiteboard, shaping HTML structure before anyone wrote a line of code.
experience.tags: Python, Robot Framework, Selenium, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Visual Regression, Android, E2E

experience.title: Test Automation Engineer
experience.desc: Full regression coverage for a complex application family — automated, every three weeks, without fail. Rebuilt the test approach with Playwright and Robot Framework, cut manual effort significantly, and got everything running in CI so the team could ship with confidence.
experience.tags: Playwright, Robot Framework, Selenium, Python, SOAP, SQL, Android, Regression

experience.title: Test Engineer
experience.desc: Workforce scheduling for 30,000 city employees — if the app breaks, half of Amsterdam feels it. I owned the testing end-to-end: functional, integration, mobile on Android, and the full GAT/FAB cycle. Nothing shipped without my sign-off.
experience.tags: AFAS, Cucumber, Jira, TopDesk, FAB/GAT, Agile, Android

experience.title: Quality Test Engineer
experience.desc: Where it all started. I trained as an Agile Test Engineer at one of the Netherlands' leading consultancies — picked up TMAP, PSM1, and hands-on experience with Tosca, Robot Framework, Selenium, and Postman. Walked in as a graduate. Walked out as a full-time engineer.
experience.tags: Tosca, Robot Framework, Selenium, Postman, Python, SQL, TMAP, Scrum

nl.bio: Ik breek dingen opzettelijk — zodat jouw gebruikers dat nooit hoeven te doen. 4+ jaar lang bouwen aan automatiseringssystemen die teams snel laten leveren én goed laten slapen.

services.title: Framework Architectuur
services.desc: De meeste teams erven een testframework dat ze haten. Ik bouw er een dat ze écht willen gebruiken — schaalbaar, CI/CD-klaar en gebouwd voor het hele team vanaf dag één.

services.title: CI/CD Integratie
services.desc: Geen 'het werkte op mijn machine' meer. Ik verbind jouw testsuite met CI/CD zodat elke commit geverifieerd wordt voordat hij de productie bereikt.

services.title: Kwaliteitsstrategie
services.desc: De meeste bugs worden geboren in de designvergadering, niet in de code review. Ik zit vroeg aan tafel — zodat kwaliteit ingebouwd is, niet er achteraf op geplakt.

es.bio: Rompo cosas a propósito — para que tus usuarios nunca tengan que hacerlo. 4+ años construyendo sistemas de automatización que permiten a los equipos entregar rápido y dormir tranquilos.

services.title: Arquitectura de Framework
services.desc: La mayoría de equipos heredan un framework de pruebas que odian. Yo construyo uno que realmente quieren usar — escalable, listo para CI/CD y pensado desde el primer día.

services.title: Integración CI/CD
services.desc: Se acabó el 'funcionaba en mi máquina.' Conecto tu suite de pruebas al CI/CD para que cada commit sea verificado antes de llegar a producción.

services.title: Estrategia de Calidad
services.desc: La mayoría de bugs nacen en la reunión de diseño. Me siento en esa mesa desde el principio — para que la calidad esté integrada, no añadida después.

fr.bio: Je casse les choses exprès — pour que vos utilisateurs n'aient jamais à le faire. 4+ ans à construire des systèmes d'automatisation qui permettent aux équipes de livrer vite et dormir sereinement.

services.title: Architecture de Framework
services.desc: La plupart des équipes héritent d'un framework qu'elles détestent. J'en construis un qu'elles veulent vraiment utiliser — scalable, prêt pour CI/CD dès le premier jour.

services.title: Intégration CI/CD
services.desc: Fini le 'ça marchait sur ma machine.' Je connecte votre suite de tests au CI/CD pour que chaque commit soit vérifié avant d'atteindre la production.

services.title: Stratégie Qualité
services.desc: La plupart des bugs naissent en réunion de conception. Je suis à cette table tôt — pour que la qualité soit intégrée, pas ajoutée après coup.

de.bio: Ich breche Dinge absichtlich — damit Ihre Nutzer das nie müssen. 4+ Jahre Aufbau von Automatisierungssystemen, die Teams schnell liefern und ruhig schlafen lassen.

services.title: Framework-Architektur
services.desc: Die meisten Teams erben ein Test-Framework, das sie hassen. Ich baue eines, das sie wirklich nutzen wollen — skalierbar, CI/CD-bereit, vom ersten Tag an für das ganze Team.

services.title: CI/CD-Integration
services.desc: Kein 'hat bei mir funktioniert' mehr. Ich verbinde Ihre Test-Suite mit CI/CD, damit jeder Commit verifiziert wird, bevor er die Produktion erreicht.

services.title: Qualitätsstrategie
services.desc: Die meisten Bugs entstehen im Design-Meeting. Ich sitze früh an diesem Tisch — damit Qualität eingebaut ist, nicht nachträglich draufgeschraubt.
